hyperedges.label: Phase 0 security/SEO fixes implemented but not deployed
Documents flagged as outdated / not source of truth
Orchestrator -> Implementer -> Reviewer -> Deployment-guardian pipeline
Orphan-user incident -> ADR-001 decision -> login runbook operational fix
First-load hang postmortem -> ADR-002 decision -> supabasePublic client adoption across services
Flujo de envío de lead: formulario → BD → notificación
og-rewrite: resolver datos dinámicos y reescribir meta tags por ruta
Patrón recurrente: supabase-js se cuelga (auth/admin/token-refresh) en múltiples incidentes
Concierge short-let service: owner request -> code change -> i18n -> production verification
French Modern Direction: React preview + standalone brand book + ADR-like doc + route exposure
Google Ads campaign launch via MCC bulk-upload templates replacing Editor-only flow
Admin panel layout composition
Public site shell (Layout + Navbar + Footer + LanguageSwitcher)
Client-side image compress-to-WebP + upload pattern
Multilingual property translation pipeline
ProseMirror/TipTap blog content system (edit, render, navigate)
Admin panel auth gating and profile management
Form composes react-hook-form + Label primitives
Shared French-language taxonomy for property search filters and listing data
Static mock data used as dev fallback before Supabase population
First-load resilience pattern (retry + cache + stale-chunk recovery)
Anonymous-client-for-public-reads architectural invariant (ADR-002)
Direct REST over supabase-js for authenticated admin ops (avoids hang)
European buyer journey: search → property detail → buyer guide
Design exploration prototypes (not shipped to production nav)
Owner monetization flows: sell, estimate, rental/concierge management
Direct REST-over-adminRest pattern for authenticated admin writes
Public reads use supabasePublic (anonymous client) to avoid auth-token-refresh hang
Admin CRUD page -> service -> Supabase/adminRest flow shared across blog/contacts/leads
RLS / privilege-escalation security hardening arc (migrations 006-009)
Neighborhood admin CRUD feature (migration + service + property_count trigger)
Leads/newsletter pipeline gated by is_active_agent() role system
